title: THC's Shorter Swords
description: Makes swords take up less screen space.
body:
![Thunderchuck's Shorter Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1019aee90464d0bea65ecbbd991a85ac185336be.png)
THC's Shorter Swords makes it so that Swords will take up less screen space which will improve your pvp exprience.

(NOTE: If the pack does not work then reload the pack.)
